{{Infobox technique
| name = Furnace
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Furnace]] is a technique [[Malachi]] uses to hurl orange fireballs.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Furnace]] can be called upon by waving a brand in a specific pattern.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] instructed someone to take scrap metal to the furnace.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Take the scrap metal to the furnace,” he said, on his way out.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
